zh.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United: 英國威爾斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾
zh.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾斯塔普爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Elidur de Stackpool於大約1130年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾時，他的父親Thomas De Stackpole-53歲，母親Catherine Howard-48歲。他於大約1150年與Lady Elspeth在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年之後在威爾士布洛可爾斯塔普爾。

zh-hans.Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾斯塔普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Elidur de Stackpool于大约1130年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾斯塔普爾时，他的父亲Thomas De Stackpole-53岁，母亲Catherine Howard-48岁。他于大约1150年与Lady Elspeth在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1188年之后在威尔士布洛可爾斯塔普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stackpool
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Stackpole
meanings: English and Welsh: habitational name from Stackpole (Pembrokeshire), apparently named with Old Norse stakkr ‘stack’ + pollr ‘pool’, referring to a stack of rocks on the coast at the entrance to Broadhaven. The name was taken to Ireland and adapted by settlers of Norman descent, where it is recorded in Dublin as early as 1200. The name has been Gaelicized as de Stacapúl; the family was also known in Irish as Galldubh ‘dark stranger’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Elidur de Stackpool was born about 1130, in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas De Stackpole, was -53 and his mother, Catherine Howard, was -48. He married Lady Elspeth about 1150, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1188, in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Elidur de Stackpool est né environ 1130, à Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas De Stackpole, avait -53 ans et sa mère, Catherine Howard, avait -48 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elspeth environ 1150, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé après 1188, à Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

Er hat um 1150 in Wales, United Kingdom Lady Elspeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1188 in Stackpole, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Elidur de Stackpoolが約1130年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスタクプオルで生まれた時，父Thomas De Stackpoleは-53歳，母Catherine Howardは-48歳であった。約1150年にイギリスウェールズでLady Elspethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年以後にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアスタクプオルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Elidur de Stackpool(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 스타ck포일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas De Stackpole(은)는 -53세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Howard(은)는 -48세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 웨일스에서 Lady Elspeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 이후 웨일스 p브로케실르 스타ck포일에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Elidur de Stackpool родился около 1130 г. в местности стаккпол, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas De Stackpole было -53 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Howard, -48. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elspeth около 1150 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1188 г. в местности стаккпол, пемброкешир, Уэльс.
